title: Prediction markets prepare to invade one of crypto’s biggest and riskiest trades
summary_full: There’s a land grab underway in the U.S. for perpetual futures, one of the biggest and riskiest parts of crypto — and prediction markets want a piece of it.
summary_public: There’s a land grab underway in the U.S. for perpetual futures, one of the biggest and riskiest parts of crypto — and prediction markets want a piece of it.
